recoverTokens(address,address,uint256).details: This method is called only by authorized entities

params.amount: Amount to send to the receiver.
params.token: It could be 0xeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeee         to recover locked native ETH or token compatible with ERC20.

recoverTokens(address,uint256,address,ui.details: This method is called only by authorized entities

params.amount: Amount to send to the receiver.
params.token: It could be 0xeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeee         to recover locked native ETH or token compatible with ERC20 or ERC6909.
params.tokenId: The token id, i.e. non-zero if the underlying token is ERC6909 and else zero.

params.user: The address to grant ward status to

deny(address).notice: Remove user as a ward (remove admin access)

recoverTokens(address,address,uint256).notice: Used to recover any ERC-20 token.

recoverTokens(address,uint256,address,ui.notice: Used to recover any ERC-20 or ERC-6909 token.

rely(address).notice: Make user a ward (give them admin access)

wards(address).notice: Returns whether the target is a ward (has admin access)
